title: Cobblemon Anime Poké Ball SFX Pack
description: With this resource pack the Cobblemon Poké Ball sound effects will be overhauled.
body:
# **Cobblemon Classic Anime Poké Ball SFX Pack**
With this resource pack the Cobblemon Poké Ball sound effects will be overhauled.

## **Info**
I used sound effects from Pokémon the animated TV series.

## **Showcase**
Coming Soon

## **Known issues**
Sound stacks a when spam throwing Poké Balls.
Sometimes when the Poké Ball is shaking the sound is a bit buggy.

# **Dependencies**
[**Cobblemon**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon)

## **To-do**
* _Maybe some small volume tweaks._
* _In the future I like to add different tweaks for different Poké Balls_
  _(Like the Master Ball SFX tweaked so it sounds more aggressive/magical or something)_ 

# **Credits**
_I did not create or do not own any of these sound effects!_  
All credit goes to the rightful creators/owners.

_According to Bulbapedia The Music & Sound Effects for the animated series is made by HALF H・P STUDIO_

[Game Freak, Inc.](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Game_Freak)   
[The Pokémon Company](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/The_Pok%C3%A9mon_Company)
[Nintendo](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Nintendo)
[HALF H・P STUDIO](https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/HALF_H%E3%83%BBP_STUDIO)
[Pokémon Animated Series](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Pok%C3%A9mon_animated_series)

## **Contact**
_**Discord: WizzStar**_
You can contact me for issues, but also requests and/or ideas.
